name: io.github.kingsnow129/database-mcp
title: Database MCP
description: Connect to SQL Server, PostgreSQL, or MySQL, inspect schemas/tables, describe table structure, and run safe SELECT queries.

packageArguments.name: --connectionString
packageArguments.description: Database connection string. Works with SQL Server, PostgreSQL, and MySQL.

packageArguments.name: --readOnly
packageArguments.description: Deprecated. Server now enforces read-only mode at all times.

packageArguments.name: --maxRows
packageArguments.description: Maximum rows returned by the query tool.

environmentVariables.name: DB_CONNECTION_STRING
environmentVariables.description: Database connection string. Prefer this single variable when configuring the server.

environmentVariables.name: DB_SERVER
environmentVariables.description: SQL Server host name or IP

tools.name: connect
tools.description: Connect to SQL Server with optional runtime overrides.

tools.name: health_check
tools.description: Check current SQL Server connection health.

tools.name: list_tables
tools.description: List tables and views, optionally filtered by schema.

tools.name: describe_table
tools.description: Describe table columns, PKs and indexes.
